overall.description: A cinematic static view from a high-rise apartment bedroom in the game Cyberpunk 2077, overlooking the sprawling futuristic metropolis of Night City. The camera remains fixed, capturing the contrast between the dim, modern interior with an unmade bed and the bright blue sky and towering skyscrapers outside, with occasional flying vehicles passing by the window.

scene_state.functional_zone: high-rise apartment bedroom with panoramic city view

events.description: small flying vehicles appear in the distance moving across the skyline
large flying car passes by the window from left to right at close range

agents.ego_description: stationary in the apartment, looking out through the window at the cityscape

notable_agents.action: flying car moving horizontally across the view outside the window

entered.detail: floor-to-ceiling window providing panoramic view of the futuristic city
unmade bed with white sheets and pillows in the foreground
tall cylindrical industrial tower with multiple levels and antennas
dense cluster of futuristic high-rise buildings and industrial structures
distant snow-capped mountains visible on the horizon beneath blue sky
illuminated rectangular ceiling light panel above the window
dark checkered tile pattern on the interior wall
modern upholstered chair in the corner of the room

segments.scene_description: A static first-person perspective from a high-rise apartment bedroom overlooking Night City. The interior features modern dark decor with an unmade bed in the foreground, while the massive window reveals a sprawling cyberpunk metropolis with towering skyscrapers against a clear blue sky. Flying vehicles occasionally pass by the window, with one prominent car moving across the view around the 28-second mark.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a static first-person perspective from a dim, modern bedroom that contrasts with the expansive, bright cityscape of Night City outside. It begins with a view of the interior's dark decor and an unmade bed in the foreground, framing the massive window that opens onto a sprawling cyberpunk metropolis. As the camera lingers, the clear blue sky provides a vivid backdrop for the towering skyscrapers that dominate the horizon. The scene then shifts its focus to the activity in the air as flying vehicles glide past the glass, including one prominent car that streaks across the field of vision.
